title: ruellia malasica
intro: Ruellia malasica, also known as Blue Trumpet or Butterfly Weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Malaysia, known for its vibrant blue flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in traditional medicine in Malaysia to treat various ailments.
